org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.actionmode.base

Class ControlPointMoveMode

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.afc.ui.actionmode.ActionMode<Figure,SwingViewGraphics2D,Color>
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.actionmode.base.ControlPointMoveMode

  •  class ControlPointMoveMode
extends ActionMode<Figure,SwingViewGraphics2D,Color>
    This class implements a Mode that move the control points of an edge.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:09
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND, Mahdi HANNOUN
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-swingpanel
